3104050.name: PolyTap
3104050.description:
Tap to the rhythm based on the shapes that emerge!

This rhythm game features 3 main notes: Circle, Square and Triangle
Single tap, hold-release and double tap for the different notes respectively.
Try to reach the end without missing a note, or simply play through the level and test your accuracy!

Features:

  • 10 levels with different music
  • Increasing difficulty of notes and timings with level progression
  • 3 main modes (Normal, Hard and Accuracy)
  • Practice mode for all main modes
  • Settings customization for smoother gameplay

Others:

It is highly recommended to set your input and music offsets before playing.
You can also change your input key-binds to best suit your needs.
3104050.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
